No Poverty.reason: The course's emphasis on job preparation, job hunting, and career planning equips students with skills to access economic resources, aligning with Target 1.4.

Zero Hunger.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives relates to hunger, food security, or sustainable agriculture.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives relates to health, well-being, or medical issues.

Quality Education.reason: As a university course, it provides quality tertiary education (Target 4.3). Its explicit focus on job hunting, business communication, and problem-solving directly aligns with developing relevant skills for employment (Target 4.4).
evidence: be well-equipped with English language skills in job hunting

Gender Equality.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives relates to gender equality or women's empowerment.

Clean Water and Sanitation.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives relates to water, sanitation, or hygiene.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives relates to energy.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course's core focus on job preparation, job hunting skills, and communication in business contexts directly prepares students for 'full and productive employment and decent work' (Target 8.5).

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives relates to industry, innovation, or infrastructure development.

Reduced Inequalities.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives relates to reducing inequalities based on income, age, sex, disability, race, or other status.

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives relates to sustainable cities or communities.

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: Core Competency B explicitly requires students to 'understand and be able to identify ethics, social responsibility, and sustainability issues,' directly supporting awareness for sustainable development (Target 12.8).
evidence: understand and be able to identify ethics, social responsibility, and sustainability issues

Climate Action.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives specifically relates to climate action.

Life Below Water.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives relates to marine life or ocean conservation.

Life on Land.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives relates to terrestrial ecosystems or biodiversity.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The course's focus on 'negotiating,' 'crisis management,' and identifying 'ethics' in business contexts indirectly supports the development of skills relevant to building effective and accountable institutions (Target 16.6).

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The course develops 'professional communication skills' and 'teamwork and leadership skills,' which are foundational for fostering effective partnerships (Target 17.17).
evidence: teamwork as well as develop leadership skills
